name: Zesty Clam Sauce for Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan over medium heat, stir the liquid Butter Buds, garlic, and onion for 3 minutes.
2. Stir in all remaining ingredients except pasta.
3. Over medium-low heat, continue stirring until the mixture is hot throughout.
4. Serve by spooning the clam sauce over hot pasta on a serving platter.
